code:
--- config: theme: dark --- flowchart TD harmony_of_blows[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] click harmony_of_blows callback " Harmony of Blows

Cost: 8 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Extra Action
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: None

The patterns and flows of a battlefield hold no mysteries for the character. She does not need to improvise last-second defenses. She notices openings well before they appear. She can choose her blows precisely, selecting multiple actions that combine harmoniously. In the turn in which she invokes this Charm, the character can take two extra attack actions, using Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm.
This Charm is explicitly permitted to be in a Combo with Charms of other Abilities. Note that the rules on Combos may limit the kinds of actions a character can take. " meditation_on_war[HealthTech_HIPAA_Vault] harmony_of_blows --> meditation_on_war click meditation_on_war callback " Meditation on War

Cost: 1 mote per die + 1 mote per dice pool penalty cancelled
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Calm and precision envelops the character as she strikes. She adds dice to one Melee attack, increasing it to a maximum of its normal pool plus the character's Essence. For example, an Essence 3 character who has a - 1 wound penalty can spend up to 4 motes to enhance her attack. This can overcome penalties that reduce the character's dice pool to 0 before Charms. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Temperance with this Charm. " orchestration_of_conflict[HealthTech_PatientRecords] harmony_of_blows --> orchestration_of_conflict click orchestration_of_conflict callback " Orchestration of Conflict

Cost: 2 motes per target number reduction
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 3
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows

Manipulating the local flow of a conflict through the ripple effects of her own actions, the character reduces the target number for a Melee attack or parry. " impeding_the_flow[HealthTech_PatientRecords] click impeding_the_flow callback " Impeding the Flow

Cost: 3 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 2
Minimum Essence: 1
Prerequisite Charms: None

A wind full of red stardust and the character's will, visible to those who can see dematerialized spirits, spins around the character. It reroutes the flows of Essence and fate that normally allow others to attack her. A casual movement of the Exalt's weapon parries any one incoming attack she is aware of, so long as the attack has a physical component and is not specifically noted as impossible to block. This is not a perfect defense. " serenity_in_blood[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] harmony_of_blows --> serenity_in_blood impeding_the_flow --> serenity_in_blood click serenity_in_blood callback " Serenity in Blood

Cost: 5 motes, 1 Willpower
Duration: Instant
Type: Reflexive
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 2
Prerequisite Charms: Harmony of Blows, Impeding the Flow

Stirring the currents of fate with the tip of her weapon, the character disrupts the path of any attack made against her, so long as it passes through any portion of the world bound by fate. If she is unaware of the attack, her player must make a reflexive Perception + Melee roll at difficulty 3 to divert the blow. Otherwise, this is a perfect block, capable of stopping even unblockable attacks. " smiling_at_the_damned[HealthTech_EMR_Sync] click smiling_at_the_damned callback " Smiling at the Damned

Cost: 5 motes
Duration: Instant
Type: Supplemental
Minimum Melee: 4
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: None

In the moment the character's weapon strikes true, the colors around her take on a harsh red tinge. Essence dissolves at the weapon's touch. Halve the raw damage for one attack, rounding down, but the damage is aggravated. Sidereal Exalted may always use their Conviction with this Charm. " perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior[HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine] meditation_on_war --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior orchestration_of_conflict --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior serenity_in_blood --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior smiling_at_the_damned --> perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior click perfection_of_the_visionary_warrior callback " Perfection of the Visionary Warrior

Cost: 10 motes, 1 Willpower, 1 health level
Duration: One scene
Type: Simple
Minimum Melee: 5
Minimum Essence: 3
Prerequisite Charms: Meditation on War, Orchestration of Conflict, Serenity in Blood, Smiling at the Damned

This Charm uses a prayer strip marked with the scripture of the Maiden on the Shelf. The character places it across his eyes, whereupon it adheres and begins to drip with dark blood. The character suffers no visibility penalties. All opponents and attacks become apparent to him, although effects such as the Mental Invisibility Technique can force him to ignore them. He sees enemies not as bodies and faces but as patterns of fate and potential or — for creatures outside of fate — disruptions in such patterns. The character can reflexively parry any blockable attack with his full Dexterity + Melee dice pool. Once per turn, after his initiative, he can reflexively make an Archery, Brawl, Melee or Thrown attack at his full dice pool. He cannot use the latter ability in any turn where he splits his normal dice pool. "
repo_description: Interactive charms graphs for Exalted first Edition

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要把这套战斗Charm系统可视化，核心是一个叫"Harmony of Blows"的能力，它允许角色在一回合内进行两次额外攻击。我打算把它作为整个流程图的根节点。
明白了，这个Harmony of Blows是前置条件最少的核心Charm。那它应该连接到哪些下游节点？从描述看，它似乎是Meditation on War和Orchestration of Conflict的共同前提？
对，这两个都直接依赖Harmony of Blows。Meditation on War是补充性的骰子加成，Orchestration of Conflict则是降低目标数值。另外还有一个独立的防御Charm叫Impeding the Flow，它不需要Harmony of Blows作为前提。
好的，那我先画出四条独立的分支：Harmony of Blows向下分出Meditation on War和Orchestration of Conflict；Impeding the Flow单独放在旁边作为另一条线。这样结构清晰吗？
结构没问题，但要注意Serenity in Blood这个Charm——它比较特殊，同时需要Harmony of Blows和Impeding the Flow两个前置。它是这个体系里唯一的"双入口"节点。
收到，Serenity in Blood会有两条入边。那Smiling at the Damned呢？我看它描述里没有明确的前置Charm。
没错，Smiling at the Damned也是独立起点，和Impeding the Flow类似。但它最终会汇聚到同一个终点。
说到终点，这个体系应该有一个顶级Charm作为 culmination 吧？需要多个前置条件汇聚的那种。
是的，Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。它需要四个前置：Meditation on War、Orchestration of Conflict、Serenity in Blood，还有Smiling at the Damned。这是整个Melee Charm树的最顶端。
好的，我现在把Perfection of the Visionary Warrior放在最下方，四条线从上方汇聚过来。Harmony of Blows在左上角，分出两路到中间层；Impeding the Flow在左下角，向上连到Serenity in Blood；Smiling at the Damned在右侧独立存在。
等等，Serenity in Blood的位置需要调整——它应该在中间层偏左，同时接收来自上方Harmony of Blows和下方Impeding the Flow的连接。不是Impeding the Flow向上连，而是Serenity in Blood向下兼容两者。
明白了，我修正一下：Serenity in Blood作为中间节点，入边来自上方的Harmony of Blows和左侧的Impeding the Flow，出边向下通往Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。这样流向就对了。
对，现在逻辑通了。另外每个节点我都要附加完整的规则文本，包括Cost、Duration、Type这些字段，还有具体的Mechanics描述。
我会用click callback的方式嵌入这些详细信息。比如Harmony of Blows要标明它是Extra Action类型，Cost 8 motes，允许Archery/Brawl/Melee/Thrown四种攻击形式，还特别注明了Sidereal可以用Temperance。
Perfection of the Visionary Warrior的信息最长，要包含祈祷条的设定、视觉效果的描述、以及两个关键机制——无 visibility penalty 的全防御，和每回合一次的全额攻击。

全部理解了。最终结构：Harmony of Blows作为诊断引擎核心，向下连接Meditation on War和Orchestration of Conflict；Impeding the Flow作为独立入口，与Harmony of Blows共同汇入Serenity in Blood；Smiling at the Damned单独存在；四路汇聚至Perfection of the Visionary Warrior。所有节点都附带完整规则callback。
